title: Daewoo Glide Iron, The Free Glide, 2200W, Cordless Iron, Corded Base, High Burst Steam And Precision Tip, Adjustable Temperature Dial And Self Clean Function With Anti Calcium Function, Purple
features: CORDLESS – Experience the ultimate convenience. Seamlessly switch between the corded base for continuous power and the cordless iron for unrestricted movement. The unlock button ensures hassle-free transitions, making ironing a breeze

SMOOTH IRONING EXPERIENCE – Experience seamless ironing with the Daewoo Free Glide iron. Its precision tapered tip allows for easy manoeuvring, while the ceramic coating on the soleplate ensures smooth gliding over fabrics, delivering wrinkle-free results

IMPRESSIVE WRINKLE REMOVAL – Experience the power and versatility of steam and spray options to effortlessly refresh and smooth your garments. Featuring a high burst steam function for tackling stubborn wrinkles leaving your clothes wrinkle free

DURABLE PERFORMANCE – Equipped with a self-cleaning feature, ensuring optimal performance and longevity, while the anti-calcium function prevents calcium buildup, allowing you to enjoy efficient ironing without worrying about potential clogs

WATER MANAGEMENT – Equipped with a convenient water tank with a max fill indicator, and includes a measuring cup ensuring precise water filling, while the anti-drip feature keeps your fabrics spotless by preventing water leakage during use
ENJOY PEACE OF MIND – With a generous 3-year warranty on your purchase, subject to online registration, ensuring your Daewoo Free Gilde Iron is backed by reliable support for an extended period
description: For those seeking an iron that effortlessly combines versatility with convenience, the Daewoo Free Glide Cord/Cordless Iron (2200W) stands as the ideal choice. Tailored for individuals who value seamless ironing experiences, this appliance is designed to meet the demands of modern households. Why settle for the ordinary when you can elevate your ironing routine with a precision-tapered tip and ceramic soleplate? Whether you're tackling intricate details or smoothing out larger surfaces, the Daewoo Power Glide iron ensures wrinkle-free results every time. What sets this iron apart from the rest is its ingenious blend of features. The corded and cordless functionality allows users to navigate freely, while the unlock button simplifies the transition between modes. The ceramic coating on the soleplate guarantees smooth gliding, making ironing a breeze. The water tank's max fill level indicator, coupled with an included measuring cup, ensures precise water management. Plus, with a high burst steam option, steam and spray capabilities, self-cleaning, and an anti-calcium function, this iron is a powerhouse of efficiency. The Daewoo Free Glide Cord/Cordless Iron comes with a 3-year warranty, subject to online registration. This comprehensive warranty adds an extra layer of assurance, promising long-lasting performance and durability for your ironing needs.
